feedback.text: Our society revolves around the digital world. The digital world has become as real as the world that surrounds us. In this society, we have the freedom to choose how to live as long as we live by the rules our government has made for us. When we let corporations dictate the rules of our digital world, their power and influence over our lives will be as great as our governments. The fact that a corporation could restrict the way people interact with this digital world will cause innovation, creativity, and our freedom to be diminished. Since the only driving factor behind the corporations is to make as much money off us as possible, at all times. Our rights, given to us by our governments, will be thrown out by these corporations. We must not let this happen.
